summary: The protagonist, Ha Jin, finds himself isolated and engaged in a desperate fight against an incredibly fast and cunning opponent. Despite his efforts, Ha Jin quickly realizes he is outmatched, likening his formidable foe to Kim Su-Ho. As he faces imminent defeat and believes his end is near, Ha Jin senses a mysterious 'calling' from the dungeon, reminiscent of their first encounter. His dire situation is unexpectedly interrupted by the sudden appearance of the Captain.
key_moments: Ha Jin is isolated and confronts a fast, murderous opponent.
He struggles to anticipate his foe's moves and realizes the opponent is unbeatable, likening them to Kim Su-Ho.
Ha Jin believes he is at his end, convinced he cannot defeat his opponent.
He experiences a mysterious 'calling' sensation, reminiscent of his first dungeon encounter.
The Captain suddenly appears, interrupting Ha Jin's predicament.
